issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (cards on your field), not 'HasRestingDon' (already-resting cards). The effect requires paying 2 DON!! from your field.
Target scope is incomplete. Effect allows resting 'up to 1 of your opponent's DON!! cards OR Characters with cost ≤1'. Current scope only covers Characters. Must include DON!! cards as valid targets.
